operator_ask: Provide either the absolute path to a durable least-privilege Model Armor service-account JSON key via GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS, or run `gcloud auth application-default login` for the gateway identity.

audit.verdict: ADD-WITH-CONSTRAINTS (provisioning required before any live wiring)
audit.prereq_determination: GCP PROJECT service, not an API-key endpoint; existing GOOGLE_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY CANNOT call it

prerequisites_operator_must_provision: dedicated service account sa-model-armor-gw with roles/modelarmor.user only (+ roles/modelarmor.calloutUser only if using the managed Agent Gateway)
region choice (data-residency) + Model Armor template (Low default; High for prompt-injection/jailbreak)
gateway identity via ADC / Workload Identity / impersonation (preferred) or a tightly-scoped off-repo key file - never injected into any model lane
confirm/recheck 2026 per-unit pricing + set spend ceiling
data-residency / egress sign-off (prompts + responses egress to Google)

accepted_operator_sources: absolute off-repo service-account key path supplied through GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
Application Default Credentials created by gcloud auth application-default login
auth.rejected_source: MODEL_ARMOR_API_TOKEN and other copied bearer tokens are short-lived and must not be configured
auth.note: no credential literal is stored here or in any cutover config

gateway_design.flow: Gemini-lane request -> sanitizeUserPrompt -> forward to Gemini -> sanitizeModelResponse -> return to lane
gateway_design.fail_mode_input: FAIL-CLOSED to a local fallback (LlamaFirewall PromptGuard 2 or heuristic); block if fallback also unavailable
gateway_design.fail_mode_output: FAIL-OPEN with alert (operator may tighten to fail-closed for strict DLP)
gateway_design.posture: defense-in-depth only; never the sole control; Gemini lane keeps its own safety settings underneath
gateway_design.data_residency: prompts and responses egress to Google in the template region; do not route highly-sensitive target data/creds without operator sign-off

unverified: Model Armor 2026 per-unit pricing (recheck at procurement)
